generated.findings: The heart and mediastinum are unremarkable. The lungs are hyperexpanded. The lungs are clear without infiltrate. There is no effusion or pneumothorax.

ground_truth.findings: Stable cardiomediastinal silhouette. There is mild haziness in the right lung and left base, which could represent infiltrate. No pleural effusion. No pneumothorax. Stable [REDACTED] deformity of a midthoracic vertebra.
ground_truth.impression: 1. Possible infiltrates in the right lung and left base. Consider CT for further evaluation, if clinically indicated.
